name: change_point.max_pvalue
description: significance threshold — change points above this are discarded

name: change_point.min_magnitude
description: minimum relative change (fraction) to keep a change point

name: change_point.min_sample_size
description: skip detection if fewer values than this

name: change_point.pvalue_moderate_threshold
description: first-pass relaxation boundary — moderate max_pvalue values get 2x relaxation

name: change_point.pvalue_strict_threshold
description: first-pass relaxation boundary — strict max_pvalue values get 10x relaxation

name: change_point.window_size
description: sliding window length for E-Divisive algorithm
